title: Keep inner area overlays inside zone areas
description: Boundary and subgraph areas are no longer pushed outside zone areas by cross-kind area packing. Zone remains the physical outer grouping, while same-kind area boxes can still be separated from each other.
decision_notes: TASK-041 packed all area overlay kinds against each other, which prevented overlap but incorrectly moved boundary/subgraph boxes outside the zone they describe.
Adjusted packing so only same-kind area boxes block each other. Cross-kind nesting is preserved: zone is the outer physical region, and boundary/subgraph can remain inside it.
Updated regression expectations from cross-kind non-overlap to containment: boundary/subgraph areas must stay inside a zone in the combined overlay and after abstraction collapse.
verification: dist demo seed check: overview with subgraph+zone+boundary reports outside=[] for boundary/subgraph containment within zones
